name: Mexican Bean Stew
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons Mexican Spice Mix (5 tsp Cumin, 5 tsp Chili powder, 2.5 tsp Black pepper, 3 tbsp Minced onions, 3 tbsp Minced garlic, 1.25 tsp Salt)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine pinto beans, seasoning mix, vegetables (carrots and zucchini), and tomato sauce in a large pot.
2. Add enough water to achieve the desired consistency.
3. Bring to a simmer and cover. Cook for 30-60 minutes.
4. Mexican Spice Mix: In a covered bottle, combine equal parts of cumin, chili powder, black pepper, onions, garlic, and salt. Use 3 tablespoons of this mix per cup of dried beans.
